raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-description of an ongoing attentional or reflective discipline, framed as personal practice rather than assertion of fact",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a distinction exists between involuntary thoughts and endorsed ones",
    "this distinction can be cultivated through practice",
    "the speaker is currently engaged in such cultivation"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a compact statement of metacognitive intent; the phrasing treats the distinction as workable rather than absolute",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the listener recognizes the statement as an invitation to consider similar reflective habits or as aesthetic expression of mental discipline",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is taken as a literal factual report of achieved mastery rather than an ongoing or aspirational practice"
}
